positive: A stylized cosmic adventure scene featuring a majestic, bioluminescent fox standing on a floating lunar rock, gazing at a nebula-filled night sky. The fox should be silhouetted against the vibrant colors of the galaxy, casting soft internal light. Incorporate geometric cosmic elements, abstract stellar dust trails, and constellations formed by glowing white lines. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets vaporwave aesthetic, with clean, vector-graphic lines and deep contrast. Colors: Deep indigo, magenta, cyan, and stellar gold. Ideal for high-quality screen printing on apparel.
negative: low detail, blurry, grain, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, writing, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered hands, cartoonish, realistic photo, clutter, busy background
